revision.comment: Pipe to WP:PNTCU to hide dated section link fragment.
revision.text:
---- If '''you''' have just labeled this {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|page|article}} as needing {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|attention|translation}}, please add
{{tlx|Needtrans |pg{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}}  |language{{=}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} |{{{1}}}|unknown}}  |comments{{=}}{{#if: {{{3|}}} |{{{3}}}|}}  |subst=yes}} ~~~~
to the bottom of {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|the [[WP:PNTCU#{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|WP:PNTCU]] section on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]]|[{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Pages_needing_translation_into_English|action=edit§ion=4}} this section of ''Pages needing translation into English'']}}.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|| Please consider also placing
{{tlx|subst=yes|uw-notenglish{{#switch: {{{1|}}} |French=-fr|Norwegian=-no|Polish=-pl|Spanish=-es|#default=}} |1{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}} }} ~~~~
on the talk page of the author.}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
---- If '''you''' have just labeled this {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|page|article}} as needing {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|attention|translation}}, please add
{{tlx|Needtrans |pg{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}}  |language{{=}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} |{{{1}}}|unknown}}  |comments{{=}}{{#if: {{{3|}}} |{{{3}}}|}}  |subst=yes}} ~~~~
to the bottom of {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|the [[WP:PNTCU#{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|WP:PNTCU]] section on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]]|[{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Pages_needing_translation_into_English|action=edit§ion=4}} this section of ''Pages needing translation into English'']}}.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|| Please consider also placing
{{tlx|subst=yes|uw-notenglish{{#switch: {{{1|}}} |French=-fr|Norwegian=-no|Polish=-pl|Spanish=-es|#default=}} |1{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}} }} ~~~~
on the talk page of the author.}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
---- If '''you''' have just labeled this {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|page|article}} as needing {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|attention|translation}}, please add
{{tlx|Needtrans |pg{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}}  |language{{=}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} |{{{1}}}|unknown}}  |comments{{=}}{{#if: {{{3|}}} |{{{3}}}|}}  |subst=yes}} ~~~~
to the bottom of {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|the [[WP:PNTCU#{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|WP:PNTCU]] section on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]]|[{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Pages_needing_translation_into_English|action=edit§ion=4}} this section of ''Pages needing translation into English'']}}.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|| Please consider also placing
{{tlx|subst=yes|uw-notenglish{{#switch: {{{1|}}} |French=-fr|Norwegian=-no|Polish=-pl|Spanish=-es|#default=}} |1{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}} }} ~~~~
on the talk page of the author.}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
---- If '''you''' have just labeled this {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|page|article}} as needing {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|attention|translation}}, please add
{{tlx|Needtrans |pg{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}}  |language{{=}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} |{{{1}}}|unknown}}  |comments{{=}}{{#if: {{{3|}}} |{{{3}}}|}}  |subst=yes}} ~~~~
to the bottom of {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|the [[WP:PNTCU#{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|WP:PNTCU]] section on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]]|[{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Pages_needing_translation_into_English|action=edit§ion=4}} this section of ''Pages needing translation into English'']}}.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|| Please consider also placing
{{tlx|subst=yes|uw-notenglish{{#switch: {{{1|}}} |French=-fr|Norwegian=-no|Polish=-pl|Spanish=-es|#default=}} |1{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}} }} ~~~~
on the talk page of the author.}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
---- If '''you''' have just labeled this {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|page|article}} as needing {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|attention|translation}}, please add
{{tlx|Needtrans |pg{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}}  |language{{=}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} |{{{1}}}|unknown}}  |comments{{=}}{{#if: {{{3|}}} |{{{3}}}|}}  |subst=yes}} ~~~~
to the bottom of {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|the [[WP:PNTCU#{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|WP:PNTCU]] section on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]]|[{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Pages_needing_translation_into_English|action=edit§ion=4}} this section of ''Pages needing translation into English'']}}.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|| Please consider also placing

on the talk page of the author.}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
---- If '''you''' have just labeled this {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|page|article}} as needing {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|attention|translation}}, please add

on the talk page of the author.}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
---- If '''you''' have just labeled this {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|page|article}} as needing {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|attention|translation}}, please add
{{tlx|Needtrans |pg{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}}  |language{{=}}{{#if: {{{1|}}} |{{{1}}}|unknown}}  |comments{{=}}{{#if: {{{3|}}} |{{{3}}}|}}  |subst=yes}} ~~~~
to the bottom of {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|the [[WP:PNTCU#{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}|WP:PNTCU]] section on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]]|[{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Pages_needing_translation_into_English|action=edit§ion=4}} this section of ''Pages needing translation into English'']}}.{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|| Please consider also placing
{{tlx|subst=yes|uw-notenglish{{#switch: {{{1|}}} |French=-fr|Norwegian=-no|Polish=-pl|Spanish=-es|#default=}} |1{{=}}{{FULLPAGENAME}} }} ~~~~
on the talk page of the author.}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
---- If '''you''' have just labeled this {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|page|article}} as needing {{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|cleanup|attention|translation}}, please add
